description:
Identify parcels eligible for Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) development in San Francisco and aggregate capacity by zone using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/adu_capacity.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. A parcel is eligible if it meets three criteria: exactly one residential unit, zero non-residential space, and a lot area of at least 3,000 square feet (identifiable via columns such as parcel_sqft or shape_area).

Export the zone-level results to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_adu_capacity.csv with the columns: zone_id, total_parcels, eligible_parcels, and pct_eligible. Save a summary JSON to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/adu_summary.json containing the keys: total_eligible_citywide, zone_with_most_capacity, max_capacity_in_a_zone, and average_pct_eligible_across_zones (unweighted mean). Additionally, generate a bar chart of the top 15 zones by eligible parcel count at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_adu_zones.png. The notebook must be fully executed.
